verified.notes: Age 60+ qualifies for alternative eligibility pathway (Net Income and Asset tests) if over gross income limit. Gross income limits shown are 200% of federal poverty level for Oct. 1, 2025–Sept. 30, 2026. Asset limits not specified in retrieved official Connecticut SNAP sources; federal SNAP has asset limits but Connecticut sources do not explicitly state countable asset thresholds. Phone number extracted from video transcript (855-626-3632).
